lines.text: I-I have you now. You're going nowhere!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Huh? Why are you all looking at me like that... Wait, please don't tell me you think I'm the imposter?
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: {PlayerName}, surely you can tell the difference, right?
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: That's right! This guy hasn't said a single word since we met. Hey, you! Can you actually answer me if I start talking to you?
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Y-You sure about that? There's hardly any difference!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Wait! I noticed something—this guy hasn't said a single word since we met! Hey, you! Can you actually answer me if I start talking to you?
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
Thank you, and farewell, my other self
